title: Magic Bomb
description: Take [blue]20[/blue] damage at the end of your turn. Is cleared if the Magi Knight dies.
smart_description: Take [blue]20[/blue] damage at the end of your turn. Is cleared if the Magi Knight dies.
notes: Triggers at the end of your turn if the applier (Magi Knight) is alive. The power is removed after triggering once, or immediately if the applier dies before the trigger.
